questionTextSource: What could happen if your vehicle is not loaded according to the load distribution plan?
explanationSource: The load distribution plan shows how the vehicle must be loaded. If the load is unevenly distributed, the braking behaviour will change considerably. Damage to tyres occurs and steering ability is also impaired.
answerASource: The tyres may become damaged
answerBSource: The steering ability may be affected
answerCSource: Its braking performance may be adversely affected
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz yuk taqsimoti rejasiga muvofiq yuklanmasa nima yuz berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yuk taqsimoti rejasi transport vositasi qanday yuklanishi kerakligini ko‘rsatadi. Yuk notekis taqsimlansa, tormozlash xususiyati ancha o‘zgaradi. Shinalar shikastlanishi va rul boshqaruvi ham yomonlashishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What specific information can you find in a load distribution plan?
explanationSource: The load distribution plan gives information on the load centre of gravity with the maximum permissible load.
answerASource: Information about the centre of gravity of the load at the maximum allowable load limit
answerBSource: Information about securing the load on the load platform
answerCSource: Information about the maximum height of the load on the load platform
questionTextTarget: Yuk taqsimoti rejasida qanday aniq ma’lumotlarni topish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yuk taqsimoti rejasi maksimal ruxsat etilgan yuk chegarasida yukning og‘irlik markazi haqida ma’lumot beradi.
answerATarget: Maksimal ruxsat etilgan yuk chegarasida yukning og‘irlik markazi haqida ma’lumot
answerBTarget: Yuk maydonida yukni mahkamlash haqida ma’lumot
answerCTarget: Yuk maydonidagi yukning maksimal balandligi haqida ma’lumot

questionTextSource: Who is responsible for securing the load on the vehicle?
answerASource: The driver
answerBSource: The shipper
answerCSource: The receiver
questionTextTarget: Transport vositasida yukni mahkamlash uchun kim javobgar?
explanationTarget: Yukni mahkamlash uchun avvalo haydovchi javobgar. Yuk jo‘natuvchi ham o‘z majburiyatlariga ega bo‘lishi mumkin. Qabul qiluvchi odatda yukni mahkamlash uchun javobgar emas.

questionTextSource: What can help with friction-locked load securing?
explanationSource:
In force-locking load securing, the transported goods are pressed onto the loading surface by means of lashing. This type of lashing is also known as tie-down lashing.
The load usually stands freely on the loading surface and is only secured by the increased force applied. In most cases, the frictional force between the loading surface and the load is increased.
The load is secured with the aid of load securing equipment such as lashing straps, lashing chains, anti-slip mats or cover nets and with the aid of attachment points on the loading surface.
This prevents the load from slipping.
answerASource: Lashing straps
answerBSource: Anti-slip mats
answerCSource: Lashing chains
questionTextTarget: Ishqalanish orqali yukni mahkamlashda nima yordam beradi?
explanationTarget: Kuch bilan mahkamlashda yuk bog‘lash vositalari yordamida yuk maydoniga bosiladi. Bu “pastga bosib bog‘lash” deb ham ataladi. Odatda yuk erkin turadi va qo‘shimcha kuch orqali mahkamlanadi. Ko‘pincha yuk maydoni bilan yuk orasidagi ishqalanish kuchi oshiriladi. Bunda tortish tasmalari, zanjirlar, sirpanishga qarshi gilamchalar yoki yopuvchi to‘rlar yordam beradi.

questionTextSource: What should be taken into consideration when selecting load-securing lashing equipment?
explanationSource:
Among other things, the face and shape of the load are decisive for the selection of suitable and necessary lashing equipment. 
Equally important are the requirements of the vehicle, such as the permissible payload and the attachment points.
answerASource: The shape of the load
answerBSource: The weight of the load
answerCSource: The available lashing points
questionTextTarget: Yukni mahkamlash uchun bog‘lash vositalarini tanlashda nimani hisobga olish kerak?
explanationTarget: Mos va zarur bog‘lash vositalarini tanlashda yukning shakli va og‘irligi muhim. Transport vositasining talablari, masalan ruxsat etilgan yuk ko‘tarish qobiliyati va mavjud mahkamlash nuqtalari ham muhim.

questionTextSource: You want to secure your load by lashing it down. What should you bear in mind?
explanationSource: When lashing down, the load is pressed onto the loading area using lashing devices to increase the friction force and prevent slipping. It is important to check the tension of the lashing devices, as the necessary contact force and thus the required friction can only be achieved with sufficient tension. In addition, this method is only suitable for dimensionally stable loads; flexible goods can deform under the tension, which means that the pre-tensioning force is lost and load securing is no longer guaranteed.
answerASource: - regularly check the tension of the lashing equipment
answerBSource: - only secure dimensionally stable loads by lashing them down
answerCSource: - choose the smallest possible lashing angle
questionTextTarget: Yukni pastga bosib bog‘lash orqali mahkamlamoqchisiz. Nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Pastga bosib bog‘lashda yuk bog‘lash vositalari yordamida yuk maydoniga bosiladi, ishqalanish kuchi oshiriladi va sirpanish oldi olinadi. Bog‘lash vositalari tarangligini muntazam tekshirish muhim, chunki zarur bosish kuchi faqat yetarli taranglik bilan hosil bo‘ladi. Bu usul faqat shaklini saqlaydigan yuklarga mos; egiluvchan yuklar taranglik ostida deformatsiyalanib, mahkamlash kuchi yo‘qolishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: - faqat shaklini saqlaydigan yuklarni pastga bosib bog‘lash orqali mahkamlash
answerCTarget: - imkon qadar eng kichik bog‘lash burchagini tanlash

questionTextSource: What is better for reasons of driving safety?
explanationSource: Since you could load (truck) in a truck with a trailer on the front part of the weight, it is better for the sake of driving safety when the trailer is empty.
answerASource: The truck is loaded and the trailer is empty
answerBSource: The trailer is loaded and the truck is empty
questionTextTarget: Haydash xavfsizligi nuqtayi nazaridan nima yaxshiroq?
explanationTarget: Tirkamali yuk mashinasida og‘irlikni yuk mashinasining old qismiga joylashtirish mumkin bo‘lgani uchun haydash xavfsizligi nuqtayi nazaridan yuk mashinasi yuklangan, tirkama esa bo‘sh bo‘lgani ma’qul.

questionTextSource: What must you remember when you wish to transport animals on a trailer?
explanationSource: You have to make sure that the maximum authorized mass of the trailer is not exceeded and subject to special rules for the transport of animals in an animal transportation.
answerASource: The special regulations for the transport of animals
answerBSource: The total permissible mass of the trailer must not be exceeded
answerCSource: Animals may only be transported on trailers with air-brakes
questionTextTarget: Tirkamada hayvon tashimoqchi bo‘lsangiz, nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tirkamaning ruxsat etilgan maksimal massasi oshib ketmasligiga va hayvonlarni tashish bo‘yicha maxsus qoidalarga rioya qilinishiga ishonch hosil qilishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Tirkamaning ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasi oshib ketmasligi kerak
answerCTarget: Hayvonlar faqat pnevmatik tormozli tirkamalarda tashilishi mumkin

questionTextSource: When must attached working equipment be marked with red-white warning plates?
explanationSource: A red and white warning board is then to mount when it protrudes rearward more than 1 m on the rear lamps of the tractor if it has traffic hazardous parts and also when it laterally by more than 40 cm beyond the boundary or rear lamps of the tractor protrudes. All three are correct.
answerASource: When it has parts presenting a danger to traffic
answerBSource: When extending laterally more than 40 cm beyond the side lights or rear lights of the tractor
answerCSource: When extending more than 1 m to the back beyond the rear lights of the tractor
questionTextTarget: Ulangan ish jihozlari qachon qizil-oq ogohlantirish taxtalari bilan belgilanishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar ish jihozi traktor orqa chiroqlaridan orqaga 1 m dan ortiq chiqsa, harakat uchun xavfli qismlari bo‘lsa yoki traktor yon chiroqlari yoki orqa chiroqlaridan yon tomonga 40 sm dan ortiq chiqsa, qizil-oq ogohlantirish taxtasi o‘rnatilishi kerak.
answerBTarget: Traktorning yon yoki orqa chiroqlaridan yon tomonga 40 sm dan ortiq chiqsa
answerCTarget: Traktorning orqa chiroqlaridan orqaga 1 m dan ortiq chiqsa

questionTextSource: What duties do you have when driving a loaded vehicle?
explanationSource: If you lead a loaded vehicle, you are responsible for ensuring that the safety of the vehicle is not affected by the charge and you have to adjust your speed to the load conditions.
answerASource: I am responsible for ensuring that the load does not impair the road safety of the vehicle
answerBSource: I must adjust my speed to the nature of the load
answerCSource: With loads at risking of tipping, I have to arrange for someone to accompany the load on the loading area to ensure it is secure
questionTextTarget: Yuklangan transport vositasini boshqarganda qanday majburiyatlaringiz bor?
explanationTarget: Yuklangan transport vositasini boshqarganda yuk transport vositasining yo‘l xavfsizligiga salbiy ta’sir qilmasligini ta’minlash va tezlikni yuk xususiyatlariga moslashtirish sizning majburiyatingizdir.
answerATarget: Yuk transport vositasining yo‘l xavfsizligiga salbiy ta’sir qilmasligini ta’minlashga javobgarman
answerCTarget: Ag‘darilish xavfi bo‘lgan yuklarda, yuk maydonida yukni kuzatib boruvchi shaxs tashkil qilishim kerak

questionTextSource: What happens if you do not wear snug-fitting clothing?
explanationSource: Clothes that are not loose and not snug-fitting will be flapping at high speed which reduces your stability. They could also reduce your rear-view vision. They, however, will not have any impact on air resistance.
answerASource: At high speed, flapping clothing affects road safety
answerBSource: Blown up clothing reduces your vision in the rear-view mirror
answerCSource: Blown up clothing reduces air resistance
questionTextTarget: Jips kiyim kiymasangiz nima yuz beradi?
explanationTarget: Bo‘sh va jips bo‘lmagan kiyim yuqori tezlikda hilpiraydi va barqarorligingizni kamaytiradi. U orqa ko‘zgudagi ko‘rinishni ham cheklashi mumkin. Biroq havo qarshiligini kamaytirmaydi.
answerATarget: Yuqori tezlikda hilpiragan kiyim yo‘l xavfsizligiga ta’sir qiladi
answerBTarget: Shishib ketgan kiyim orqa ko‘zgudagi ko‘rinishni kamaytiradi
answerCTarget: Shishib ketgan kiyim havo qarshiligini kamaytiradi

questionTextSource: What must you do before setting off on a journey?
explanationSource: All three are correct. Make sure that everything is fixed well on your motorcycle. Make sure that you wear adequate clothing, check your helmet visor. And finally, ensure the safety of the road and motorcycle.
answerASource: Check road safety and operational safety of the motorcycle
answerBSource: Check helmet visor and snug-fitting clothing
answerCSource: Check if panniers and top case are fixed correctly
questionTextTarget: Safarga chiqishdan oldin nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Uchala javob ham to‘g‘ri. Mototsiklda hamma narsa yaxshi mahkamlanganiga, mos kiyim kiyganingizga va dubulg‘a vizorini tekshirganingizga ishonch hosil qiling. Shuningdek, mototsiklning yo‘lga yaroqliligi va ekspluatatsion xavfsizligini tekshiring.
answerATarget: Mototsiklning yo‘lga yaroqliligi va ekspluatatsion xavfsizligini tekshirish
answerBTarget: Dubulg‘a vizori va jips kiyimni tekshirish
answerCTarget: Yon sumkalar va top-keyz to‘g‘ri mahkamlanganini tekshirish

questionTextSource: Why are motorcyclists required to wear an appropriate protective helmet?
explanationSource: A helmet is required to protect your head against injuries and potential death
answerASource: To avoid head injuries as much as possible
answerBSource: So it is easier to listen to the radio
answerCSource: To reduce air resistance at higher speed
questionTextTarget: Nega mototsiklchilar mos himoya dubulg‘asini kiyishi shart?
explanationTarget: Dubulg‘a bosh jarohatlari va o‘lim xavfidan himoya qilish uchun kerak.
answerATarget: Bosh jarohatlarini imkon qadar oldini olish uchun
answerCTarget: Yuqori tezlikda havo qarshiligini kamaytirish uchun

questionTextSource: Which items are part of a motorcyclists safety equipment?
explanationSource: An appropriate jacket, trousers and boots are part of the safety equipment that can protect you in case of accidents and injuries. Gym shoes are not protective equipment
answerASource: Appropriate jacket
answerBSource: Appropriate trousers
answerCSource: Gym shoes
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklchining xavfsizlik jihozlariga nimalar kiradi?
explanationTarget: Mos kurtka, shim va etiklar xavfsizlik jihozlariga kiradi va avariya hamda jarohatlardan himoya qiladi. Sport poyabzali himoya jihozi emas.

questionTextSource: Why should you wear appropriate boots when riding a motorcycle?
explanationSource: Boots do not reduce air resistance. Appropriate boots are a protective that will protect you from injury and undercooling
answerASource: You could suffer considerable foot injuries even if a motorbike just topples over whilst standing
answerBSource: Undercooling due to weather factors can damage your health
answerCSource: Because air resistance is reduced
questionTextTarget: Nega mototsikl haydaganda mos etik kiyish kerak?
explanationTarget: Etiklar havo qarshiligini kamaytirmaydi. Mos etiklar jarohatlardan va sovuq urishidan himoya qiladigan himoya vositasidir.
answerATarget: Mototsikl turgan joyida ag‘darilsa ham oyoqda jiddiy jarohatlar bo‘lishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Ob-havo ta’sirida sovqotish sog‘liqqa zarar yetkazishi mumkin

questionTextSource: Which motorcycle clothing increases optical perceptibility?
explanationSource: To increase your visibility, wear bright and light colours. Dark colours are less visible, especially at night.
answerASource: Clothing in bright colours
answerBSource: Clothing in light colours
answerCSource: Clothing in dark colours
questionTextTarget: Qaysi mototsikl kiyimi ko‘rinuvchanlikni oshiradi?
explanationTarget: Ko‘rinuvchanlikni oshirish uchun yorqin va och rangdagi kiyim kiying. To‘q ranglar, ayniqsa tunda, yomonroq ko‘rinadi.

questionTextSource: Why should you regularly apply the brakes with force at standstill?
explanationSource: When standing still, use your brakes to ensure that the system works correctly (both the braking transmission, connection and the breaks themselves)
answerASource: - whether the mechanical transmission and connection components are in functioning order
answerBSource: - whether a hydraulic braking system has no leaks
answerCSource: - the deceleration of the brakes is adequate
questionTextTarget: Nega turgan holatda tormozlarni muntazam kuch bilan bosib tekshirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Turgan holatda tormozlardan foydalanib tizim to‘g‘ri ishlayotganini tekshiring: mexanik uzatish va ulanish qismlari, gidravlik tizimda sizib chiqish yo‘qligi hamda tormozlarning sekinlatish kuchi.
answerATarget: - mexanik uzatish va ulanish qismlari ish holatida ekanini
answerBTarget: - gidravlik tormoz tizimida sizib chiqish yo‘qligini

questionTextSource: What are the effects of a badly scratched helmet visor?
explanationSource: A badly scratched helmet visor will diminish your vision and will make light more intensely seen with the risk of dazzling
answerASource: The wearer is dazzled more intensely than usual
answerBSource: Own vision is impaired
answerCSource: In daylight, there are no negative effects
questionTextTarget: Juda tirnalgan dubulg‘a vizori qanday ta’sir qiladi?
explanationTarget: Juda tirnalgan vizor ko‘rishni yomonlashtiradi va yorug‘likni kuchliroq tarqatib, ko‘zni qamashtirish xavfini oshiradi.

questionTextSource: What is correct for checking the brake light?
explanationSource: Make sure that the brake light works for the hand brake and foot break separately.
answerASource: Apply hand brake and foot brake one after the other
answerBSource: Apply hand brake and foot brake at the same time
answerCSource: Apply the hand brake only
questionTextTarget: Tormoz chirog‘ini tekshirishda qaysi javob to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Tormoz chirog‘i qo‘l tormozi va oyoq tormozi bilan alohida-alohida ishlashini tekshiring.
answerATarget: Qo‘l tormozi va oyoq tormozini ketma-ket bosish
answerBTarget: Qo‘l tormozi va oyoq tormozini bir vaqtda bosish
